nasb.text: But when the crop permits, he immediately puts in the sickle, because the harvest has come.”

esv.text: But when the grain is ripe, at once he puts in the sickle, because the harvest has come.”

cnv.text: 莊稼熟了，就派人用鐮刀割下，因為收成的時候到了。”

ccb.text: 庄稼成熟后，他就拿起镰刀来收割，因为收成的时候到了。”

csbs.text: 当果实成熟的时候，他立刻伸出镰刀，因为收割的季节到了。”
